use_codes.desc: TOPICAL TREATMENT OF PRIMARY AXILLARY HYPERHIDROSIS IN ADULTS AND PEDIATRIC PATIENTS 9 YEARS OF AGE AND OLDER

indications.text:
SOFDRA is indicated for the treatment of primary axillary hyperhidrosis in adults and
pediatric patients 9 years of age and older.
